code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut current = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i <= n
  mut b = -1
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = -1
    end
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == -1

  if is_ws
    if in_num
      sum = sum + sign * current
      count = count + 1
      in_num = false
      current = 0
      sign = 1
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
